title: Gorrt

'''Gorrt''' was a powerfully built [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] who served as the bodyguard for a [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] called [[Akkik]]. The pair worked for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] collecting protection money.

==Biography==
Gorrt was born on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]] before eventually ending up in the employ of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Working as an enforcer, Gorrt's skills were underappreciated in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]] until he was rewarded with a permanent posting in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] after dealing with an uncooperative shop owner.<ref name="GG7" />

Gorrt was befriended by another of Jabba's operatives, the [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] [[Akkik]], and became his defacto protector.<ref name="TM-CA3">{{WEGCite|book=Classic Adventures: Volume Three|story=Tatooine Manhunt}}</ref> The pair would operate in Mos Eisley collecting protection money for Jabba. They were in [[Lup's Wares and Supplies]] on the same [[Standard day/Legends|day]] that [[Tar Lup|Tar]] and [[Kal Lup]] were being asked about the whereabouts of [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] by members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="TM" />

==Personality and traits==
Gorrt was generally ill-tempered, unpleasant and violent,<ref name="TM-CA3" /> and he loved to beat on beings that were smaller and weaker than he was. However, he was very protective of Akkik.<ref name="GG7" />
